mapper.select: select count(*) as orderCount, sum(case when status = 3 then 1 else 0 end) as paidCount, coalesce(sum(case when status = 3 then amount_paid end), 0) as revenueCents, coalesce(avg(case when status = 3 then duration_seconds end), 0) as avgDurationSeconds from fish_order where create_time >= curdate()

select count(*) as orderCount, coalesce(sum(case when status = 3 then amount_paid end), 0) as revenueCents from fish_order where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 day) and create_time < curdate()
select count(*) as orderCount, coalesce(sum(case when status = 3 then amount_paid end), 0) as revenueCents from fish_order where create_time >= date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m-01')

select coalesce(sum(case when status = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as running, coalesce(sum(case when status = 2 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as pending, (select count(*) from fish_user where status = '0') as userCount from fish_order

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as day, count(*) as total, sum(case when status = 3 then 1 else 0 end) as paid from fish_order where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) group by day order by day asc

select date_format(paid_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as day, coalesce(sum(amount_paid), 0) as revenueCents from fish_order where status = 3 and paid_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) group by day order by day asc
